title: Error saving Google Vertex credentials
symptom: When attempting to save Google Vertex credentials, the save button spins endlessly and a 500 error occurs in the console.
not_this_if: Credentials are entered correctly without errors
root_cause: The error occurs because the private key is not being recognized correctly by n8n. This can happen if the private key is not formatted properly or if it is not being passed correctly in the configuration.
fix_steps: Open the Google Vertex node settings
Add the private key in an expression instead of directly in the field
Save the workflow and test the credentials again
agent_instruction: Use an expression to input the private key in the Google Vertex node settings.
